session.user:
Run the following commands and report results: 1. uv run ruff check src/erk/tui/screens/objective_nodes_screen.py src/erk/tui/commands/provider.py 2. uv run ruff format --check src/erk/tui/screens/objective_nodes_screen.py src/erk/tui/commands/provider.py
Report all results.
session.assistant: I'll execute both ruff commands for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff check on specified files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff format check on specified files

session.tool_result: Exit code 1 Would reformat: src/erk/tui/screens/objective_nodes_screen.py 1 file would be reformatted, 1 file already formatted
session.assistant:
## Results
**ruff check**: passed - All checks passed!
**ruff format --check**: failed - 1 file would be reformatted: `src/erk/tui/screens/objective_nodes_screen.py` - 1 file already formatted: `src/erk/tui/commands/provider.py`
The linting passes but the format check indicates that `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/tui/screens/objective_nodes_screen.py` needs formatting changes.
